description:
src/lib.rs:311-318 put() with ?field= returns InvalidUri immediately rather than silently overwriting the whole secret with just the field value. Read-modify-write would race; partial-update via field selector at this layer would be a footgun.

A future contributor may suggest 'just implement RMW for convenience'. Defend it: RMW at this layer is racy without a Key Vault optimistic concurrency token, the SDK does not expose ETag for set_secret in 0.14, and the sister crates (aws-sm) take the same hard-no stance. The error message tells the caller exactly what to do.
title: Good: ?field= and put() interaction explicitly forbidden
